title: ChattyTimestamps
description: Shows a timestamp on chat messages when hovered.
body:
# Chatty Timestamps
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/chattytimestamps)
[![codeberg](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/codeberg_vector.svg)](https://codeberg.org/Maganoos/chattytimestamps)

A small client-side mod for Minecraft that adds a timestamp to chat messages in the hover tooltip.

The chat stays visually unchanged.
If a message already has hover text, the timestamp is added above it.
